_comment: Hand-kept publications merged into the auto-generated list by build_publications.py and tagged 'Manually added'. 'extra_dois' = published papers NOT in HAL whose citation is fetched from Crossref and tagged 'HAL/ORCID'. When a manual item later appears in HAL/ORCID, delete it here. section keys: journal, to-be-published, preprint, report, invited, oral, poster, seminar, mediation, software. oral/poster take audience: international|national.
